title: Principal Platform Consultant - Salesforce
description_text: Company Overview  10Pearls is an award-winning end-to-end digital innovation company that helps businesses imagine and build the future. We are proud to announce that 10Pearls was named as winner of the Best Tech Work Culture Timmy Award in Washington DC by Tech in Motion, recognized on the Inc. 5000 Fastest-Growing Companies List, and was ranked the #1 Most Diverse Midsize Company in Greater Washington. We partner with businesses to help them transform, scale, and accelerate by adopting digital and exponential technologies. Our work has ranged from creating highly usable, secure digital experiences, mobile and software products, to helping businesses modernize through cloud adoption and development and the digitalization of their business processes. Our clientele is highly diverse, including Global 1000 enterprises, mid-market businesses, and even high-growth start-ups. But those are just the facts. What makes us unique is that we have true heart and soul. We have a strong focus on a double bottom line and actively support and engage with the communities where we live and work to make the world a better place. In a nutshell, we believe in doing well, while doing good and know how to balance the two. Role We are currently seeking an experienced Salesforce Developer with expertise in Lightning Component (Aura & LWC), Visualforce, and JavaScript UI frameworks. The candidate will be responsible for developing custom applications and solutions on the Salesforce platform. This role involves designing, coding, testing, and deploying new features and functionality. The developer will work closely with stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into technical specifications. Responsibilities Advanced knowledge of configuration/customization of the platform. Ability to propose and devise solutions with little to no code. Assisting the Architect and coordinating technical aspect of software development activities including design, architecture, development and implementation of applications. Identify and implement opportunities for development process improvement like evaluating and adopting new technologies and platforms, best practices and patterns, creating reusable components & frameworks, etc. Act as focal point of contact for technical issues for specific work streams across multiple projects. Ensure project delivery on time along with adherence to code and quality standards. Update job knowledge by studying state-of-the-art development tools, programming techniques and computing equipment; participating in educational opportunities; reading professional publications; maintaining personal networks; participating in professional organizations. Knowledge of platform marketplace products, their development lifecycle and best practices.  Requirements Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field. 6+ years of experience in Salesforce development Develop, modify, enhance, and implement software systems designed to support new or existing business initiatives. Strong knowledge of MVC design pattern and event-driven/component-driven architecture. Expertise in writing unit test for Apex and LWC should also be a requirement Strong knowledge of Apex Classes, Triggers, Asynchronous Apex, Apex Design Patterns. Use Apex to execute flow and transaction control statements on Salesforce servers in conjunction with calls to the API. Use Lightning Component, Visualforce, and JavaScript UI frameworks for developing single page applications for desktop and mobile in the Salesforce application. Use web services, including SOAP API, REST API, Bulk API, and Metadata API, to integrate Salesforce with systems and create APIs that can be consumed by external applications. Use SOQL and SOSL Salesforce database languages to search Salesforce data using field based and text-based search queries. Version Control and CI/CD. Ability to deliver against several initiatives simultaneously Ability to prioritize and organize effectively Excellent written and verbal communication skills Excellent analytical and troubleshooting abilities Having following certifications: Salesforce Certified Platform App Builder Salesforce Certified Platform Developer Nice to have Salesforce Certified JavaScript Developer Salesforce Certified Administrator Salesforce Certified Application Architect

title: Groundskeeper and Maintenance
description_text: Join a Team That's Raising the Standard About 52TEN At 52TEN, we're transforming manufactured home communities into places our residents are proud to call home. We invest in our properties, our people, and our culture because we believe exceptional communities start with exceptional teams. We're looking for a Groundskeeper who takes pride in a job well done and enjoys seeing the immediate impact of their work every day. If you notice the little things others overlook, enjoy working outdoors, and aren't afraid to roll up your sleeves to solve problems, we'd love to meet you. This position supports a manufactured home community with an adjacent RV park in Bryan, Texas. You'll play an important role in creating clean, safe, and welcoming communities while helping deliver The Best Experience for our residents. At 52TEN, you'll join a fast-growing company where your work matters, your ideas are valued, and you'll have opportunities to grow alongside us. Why You'll Love Working at 52TEN Be part of a fast-growing company where your contributions make a visible difference. Work alongside people who genuinely care about doing things the right way. Join a culture built on teamwork, accountability, and continuous improvement. Receive the tools, training, and support you need to succeed. Help create communities that residents are proud to call home. Enjoy opportunities for professional growth as our company continues to expand. Position Summary The Groundskeeper plays an essential role in maintaining the appearance, safety, and overall quality of our manufactured home community and adjacent RV park in Bryan, Texas. Approximately 80% of this role focuses on groundskeeping and landscaping, while the remaining 20% involves light maintenance and handyman work that helps keep our homes, amenities, and common areas operating safely and efficiently. Every day is different, but every day you'll help create an environment that reflects 52TEN's commitment to excellence and The Best Experience. What You'll Do Groundskeeping (Approximately 80%) Maintain beautiful, clean, and welcoming grounds throughout the community. Mow, edge, trim, weed, and care for lawns, trees, shrubs, and landscaping. Maintain common areas, walkways, parking lots, and outdoor amenities. Inspect, troubleshoot, and perform routine repairs to irrigation systems. Remove trash, debris, and other items to keep the property looking its best. Assist with seasonal grounds maintenance as needed. Identify safety concerns or maintenance issues and proactively report or address them. Operate landscaping equipment safely and responsibly. Light Maintenance (Approximately 20%) Complete basic plumbing, electrical, carpentry, and general maintenance repairs. Respond to minor resident maintenance requests. Assist with inspections of homes, buildings, and community amenities. Support preventative maintenance and home turn activities. Coordinate with outside contractors for larger or specialized repairs when needed. Maintain tools, equipment, and maintenance supply inventory. What We're Looking For Experience At least two years of groundskeeping, landscaping, property maintenance, or related experience. Previous experience performing basic handyman or maintenance work is preferred. Skills & Qualifications Working knowledge of landscaping equipment and lawn care techniques. Basic repair skills including plumbing, electrical, carpentry, and general maintenance. Ability to safely operate mowers, trimmers, hand tools, and irrigation systems. Strong attention to detail and pride in maintaining a beautiful property. Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and manage priorities. Friendly, professional attitude with a commitment to providing excellent customer service. Comfortable using mobile devices and online work order or task management software. Physical Requirements Ability to lift and carry up to 50 pounds. Ability to stand, walk, bend, climb, and perform physical labor throughout the workday. Comfortable working outdoors in varying weather conditions. Other Requirements Valid driver's license. High school diploma or equivalent. Ability to successfully pass a background check. Benefits Medical, dental, and vision insurance Paid Time Off (PTO) and company-paid holidays Annual performance reviews with opportunities for merit increases Vacation time that increases with years of service Performance-based bonus opportunities Ongoing training and professional development Opportunities for advancement as our company continues to grow Our Culture At 52TEN, we're building more than communities—we're building a company where great people can do the best work of their careers. We take pride in doing things the right way, supporting one another, making smart decisions, and creating exceptional experiences for our residents every day. If you're someone who enjoys working outdoors, takes ownership of your work, and wants to be part of a team that's raising the standard in our industry, we'd love to hear from you.
